title: LATERN 43Pcs Laminate Floor Kit, 26CM Double Sided Rubber Mallet with Robust Tapping Block, Heavy Duty Steel Pull Bar, 40Pcs Floor Spacers - for Laminate Wood Flooring Installation
features: [43 In 1] Kit included: 1 x rubber tapping block, 1 x steel pull bar, 1 x double headed hammer (rubber and hard), 40 x spacers, help install new floors quickly, efficiently and accurately
[High quality] Made of high quality PP rubber and steel, high strength, not easy to bend and break, strong and durable, thick rubber design to prevent damage to the floor

[Easy to use] Pull bar: Eliminates gaps on the long sides of the plank; Knock Block: Can be inserted into the tongue of the board when two boards are tapped together; Spacers: Adjust the thickness of the gaps; Mallets: Tapping a tapping block can help eliminate gaps between planks
[Size] Hard plastic hammer: 25.5 x 7.5 x 5cm; Tapping block: 17 x 6 x 2cm; Pull bar: 26.5 x 4.5 x 2.5cm; Spacers: 6 x 3 x 0.6cm; Suitable for 7mm - 15mm laminate flooring

[Applicable] The mallet with non-slip rubber handle is easy to force, suitable for professional floor installation and home DIYer, suitable for installing laminate flooring, vinyl flooring or hardwood flooring etc
description: LATERN 43Pcs Laminate Floor Install Kit included a mallet with non-slip rubber handle is easy to force, suitable for professional floor installation and home DIYer, suitable for installing laminate flooring, vinyl flooring or hardwood flooring etc! Feature: - Made of high quality PP rubber and steel, high strength, not easy to bend and break, thick rubber design to prevent damage to the floor. - Pull bar: Eliminates gaps on the long sides of the plank; Mallets: Tapping a tapping block can help eliminate gaps between planks. - Spacers: Adjust the thickness of the gaps; Knock Block: Can be inserted into the tongue of the board when two boards are tapped together. - Hammer: 25.5 x 7.5 x 5cm; Tapping block: 17 x 6 x 2cm; Pull bar: 26.5 x 4.5 x 2.5cm; Spacers: 6 x 3 x 0.6cm; Suitable for 7mm - 15mm laminate flooring. Specifications: Color: Orange Material: PP, Steel Hammer: 25.5 x 7.5 x 5cm Tapping block: 17 x 6 x 2cm Pull bar: 26.5 x 4.5 x 2.5cm Spacers: 6 x 3 x 0.6cm Installation Guidance: 1.Use the pull bar to eliminate gaps on the long side of the planks. 2.Insert the tapping block into the tongue of the plank when tapping two planks together. 3.Adjust the thickness of the gap using two spacers - make sure to place the spacers on the edges, leaving enough room for expansion if needed. 4.Use the mallet to hammer the tapping block to eliminate gaps between planks. Package included: 1 x Tapping block 1 x Puller bar 1 x Rubber hammer 40 x Spacers
